name: Grilled Perch with Sage
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces white perch, gutted and scaled (12 to 15)
6 slices zucchini, oiled (1 tablespoon olive oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the grill.
2. Using a sharp knife, make 3-4 slits into the flesh of each perch on both sides.
3. Oil and season the perch with Kosher salt and olive oil.
4. Stuff 5 sprigs of sage into the cavity of each perch.
5. Place the perch on the grill and cook for 4 minutes.
6. Flip the tomatoes and zucchini as needed, then place them on the grill.
7. Cook the tomatoes and zucchini for an additional 4 minutes.
8. Transfer to serving plates and drizzle with olive oil.
Yield: 2 servings
